## Summary
- Briefly describe what changed.

## Why
- Explain why this change is needed.

## Ticket
- Refs #<issue_number>

## PR hygiene checklist
- [ ] PR title uses Conventional Commits (for example: `feat: ...`, `fix: ...`, `chore: ...`, `ci: ...`).
- [ ] Avoid non-conventional prefixes like `PR hygiene: ...`; use a valid type prefix such as `chore: ...` instead.
- [ ] PR body includes an issue reference (`Refs #...`, `Closes #...`, or issue URL).

## Testing
- List the checks you ran locally.
